markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Define Usman's new end-to-end content production role and priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Role:** Usman now owns end-to-end content production (writing & editing) for Smith and Exec, reporting to Jo.](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [**Smith Strategy Shift:** Messaging must now balance AI and human-based Virtual Receptionists (VRs), as human escalation is a key value prop.](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - **Exec Priorities:** Focus on SEO-optimizing the "SDR2AE" article and improving the "Sales Roleplay Software" piece to secure a \#1 rank.
  - [**Vacation:** Usman's Dec 15–Jan 9 OOO dates conflict with a critical production push. The schedule requires review.](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)

## Topics

### New Role & Workflow

  - [**New Structure:** Usman is a Content Manager (CM) in an EM (Jo) / CM (Usman) setup.](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
      - [Jo is the primary contact for production tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
      - [Usman now owns the full content lifecycle (writing → editing).](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [**Editorial Support:** Panzer provides editorial oversight for CMs.](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
      - [**Process:** Tag Panzer in Linear for specific editorial reviews (e.g., positioning, messaging).](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [**Linear Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
      - [Submit all produced URLs to the "Weekly Generation Task."](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)
      - [A new recurring task ensures weekly publishing tickets are filed on time.](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [**Escalation:** For capacity issues, create a Slack thread with Jo and Andy to request a rotating CM.](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)

### Smith: Strategy & Priorities

  - [**Messaging Shift:** The strategy shifts from an AI-only focus to a balanced approach.](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Human escalation is a key value prop, as you can't escalate from human back to AI.](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
      - [**Execution:** Balance the educational tone to present both AI and human VRs as viable options.](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)
  - [**Production Priorities:**](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
    1.  [**Internal Review Queue:** First priority. Check for grammar, flow, and new positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
    2.  **Industry Pages:** After the queue, update these "money pages" with the balanced AI/VR messaging.
          - [Update FAQs to reflect both options.](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
          - [Follow the detailed guidelines Jo provided.](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)

### Exec: Production & Priorities

  - [**Production Status:** 50 pieces published, ahead of schedule.](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
      - [**Schedule:** Production ends Dec 22 for a quiet week.](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [**Article: "SDR2AE Certification Program"**](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
      - [**Goal:** Optimize for SEO while retaining core content.](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)
      - [**Tactic:** Add SEO-driven sections (e.g., "Why it matters," "Training programs") based on SERP analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This justifies shortening the article by cutting some of the 50+ examples.](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=1284.0)
  - [**Article: "Sales Roleplay Software"**](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=1343.0)
      - **Goal:** Improve rank from \#32 to \#1 or \#2.
      - [**Execution:**](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=1343.0)
          - [Update the URL slug to match the target keyword.](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=1468.0)
          - [Expand sections with more detail and screenshots.](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
          - [Add specific examples for Exec's platform (e.g., handling pricing, enterprise sales).](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
          - [Improve internal linking to comparison posts.](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)

### Vacation Scheduling

  - [**Conflict:** Usman's Dec 15–Jan 9 OOO dates overlap with a critical production period.](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)
  - [**Resolution:** Usman will calculate accrued vacation days since April and present the data to Jo.](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This data will be used to justify the coverage request to Andy.](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
      - [**Contingency:** Usman can produce more content before the vacation to mitigate the impact.](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Usman:**](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
      - [Review the internal queue for Smith, applying the new AI/VR messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
      - [Update Smith's industry pages per guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
      - [Optimize the "SDR2AE" article for SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
      - [Improve the "Sales Roleplay Software" article (URL, content, links).](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=1343.0)
      - [Calculate accrued vacation days and present to Jo.](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)
  - [**Jo:**](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)
      - [Review vacation data with Usman to finalize the schedule and coverage plan.](https://fathom.video/share/wc6Et558FgEYi-HUZRmngF5pHMbyBypU?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)
